questions.question: What is the cube of $5$?
questions.explanation: To cube 5, multiply it by itself three times: $5^3 = 5 \times 5 \times 5 = 125$.

questions.question: Which of the following numbers is a perfect cube?
questions.explanation: 64 is a perfect cube because $4 \times 4 \times 4 = 64$. Note that 64 is also a perfect square ($8 \times 8 = 64$).

questions.question: What is the evaluated value of $(-3)^3$?
questions.explanation: Cubing a negative base yields a negative value because $(-3) \times (-3) \times (-3) = 9 \times (-3) = -27$.

questions.question: An open storage crate has a cubic shape with side lengths of $4$ feet. What is the interior volume of the crate?
questions.explanation: Volume of a cube is side cubed: $4^3 = 4 \times 4 \times 4 = 64$ cubic feet.
